case_title: DIANE ROTH VS. SHAWN HERMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROTH, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT HERMAN, SHAWN DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-27-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-25-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-05-2016
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-26-2016. THE SEP-07-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE REGARDING THE STIPULATED REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE ARBITRATION DEADLINE AND ALL DEPENDENT DEADLINES (TRANSACTION ID # 59820594) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERMAN, SHAWN
ARBITRATOR JOHN SCOTT BURESH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-07-2016 THROUGH JAN-05-2017.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO MAR-06-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF DIANE ROTH'S UNVERIFIED COMPLAINT;(TRANSACTION ID # 59440442) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERMAN, SHAWN
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE OCT-06-2016.

**FEE PAID** STIPULATION TO EXTEND THE JUDICIAL ARBITRATION DEADLINE AND PROPOSED ORDER EXTENDING THE JUDICIAL ARBITRATION DEADLINE PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 59793614) FILED BY DEFENDANT HERMAN, SHAWN

DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SHAWN MICHAEL THROWE.
ORDER EXTENDING THE JUDICIAL ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO MAR-06-2017 GRANTED
